title: FULL SYLLABUS TEST-4 (BASIC LEVEL) (GATE - 2021)
extractionNotes: Q1 text was cropped at the top of the page; reconstructed from visible partial text and standard aptitude phrasing.
Q4 question stem was partially cropped across a page break; reconstructed from the visible equation continuation and solution text.
Q13: option C's text was not fully visible in the source PDF screenshot (obscured/cut off in the page layout); its value could not be confirmed and may not exactly match the original PDF.
Q17, Q25, Q28, and Q65 depend on diagrams/figures shown in the PDF to be answerable; these are flagged with questionImage placeholders for separate cropping.
Math notation involving exponents, roots, set operators, and logical connectives has been converted to plain-text approximations (e.g. 2^n, sqrt, in, and/or) per the requested format.
